title: Aureline review-workspace and merge-queue-action vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the review-workspace and merge-queue-action records frozen in docs/vcs/review_workspace_contract.md. One record family pins which review surface is operating on which workspace (local branch / worktree, fetched provider overlay, imported review bundle, browser-handoff token source, or the local + overlay composite), how fresh that overlay is, who is provider-authoritative versus a local parity estimate, the workspace's lifecycle posture, and the audit-event vocabulary the workspace publishes; the merge-queue-action record pins the bound provider rule snapshot, the action class, the actor / command / approval-ticket attribution required for every mutation-class action, and the blocked-reason gate that forbids a landing action from appearing available when freshness or provider state is missing. Every comment / suggestion / evidence anchor a review surface posts resolves through the companion schemas/vcs/review_anchor.schema.json contract; the structured-artifact review-surface matrix at schemas/review/review_surface_record.schema.json owns the per-class review surface and merge posture vocabulary and is never re-minted here. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw provider rule bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; the record carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, redaction-aware reviewable labels (<= 1024 graphemes), and policy / freshness / authority / lifecycle state only. The eventual review-workspace crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, source class, provider-class, provider-overlay-freshness class, provider-authority class, lifecycle state, merge-queue action class, blocked-reason value, provider-rule-snapshot freshness class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps review_workspace_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

review_workspace_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the review-workspace and merge-queue-action vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests / portability exports. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw provider rule bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload. Exporters MUST apply broker-owned redaction (ADR-0007) before the value crosses this boundary.

client_scope.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). A review workspace MAY be admitted on more than one client_scope; the resolution surface MUST honour the descriptor's client-scope narrowing.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). Local-only review workspaces default to metadata_safe_default; provider-overlay / browser-handoff / composite workspaces touching organisationally restricted state MAY raise to internal_support_restricted; merge-queue actions touching credentialed flows MUST raise to operator_only_restricted.

freshness_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). Used by the workspace-level freshness chip; the per-overlay freshness lives in provider_overlay_freshness_class and the per-rule freshness lives in provider_rule_snapshot_freshness_class.

workspace_trust_state_class.description: Re-exported from ADR-0018. A review workspace minted under unset_pending_decision MUST resolve through a trust prompt before mutation-class merge-queue actions are admissible; the merge-queue allOf gate enforces this through workspace_trust_unset_or_restricted blocked reason.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. ADR-0008 / ADR-0009 policy epoch and ADR-0001 / ADR-0018 trust state are re-validated on every restore and mutation; a stale policy epoch denies the action with policy_epoch_expired_re_evaluation_required.

review_workspace_source_class.description: Frozen review-workspace source class. local_branch_or_worktree is a checked-out branch / Git worktree under the user's own clone with no provider overlay; provider_overlay_fetched is a remote review object whose state was fetched from the canonical code host; review_bundle_imported was hydrated from an exported review bundle (no auto re-fetch); browser_handoff_token_source was opened through an ADR-0010 browser-handoff packet (no local mutation); composite_local_with_provider_overlay pairs a local locator with a fetched overlay so the reviewer can compare local truth against provider truth.

provider_class.description: Frozen provider-class vocabulary used on the provider_overlay block. Re-uses the provider-class names from the browser-handoff family without redefinition; other_provider exists so an unknown class routes to a repair hook rather than fall back to a generic 'connected' badge.

provider_overlay_freshness_class.description: Frozen provider-overlay freshness vocabulary. provider_overlay_fresh = within the workspace's grace window; provider_overlay_stale_within_grace = past ideal freshness but inside grace, the chip surfaces 'stale' without blocking; provider_overlay_stale_beyond_grace_local_continues = past grace, provider-authoritative cues are no longer rendered as authoritative and local review continues; provider_overlay_unavailable_local_continues = the provider was unreachable on the last attempt and local review continues with the last-known cached label marked degraded. A workspace whose freshness resolves to stale_beyond_grace_local_continues or unavailable_local_continues MUST resolve provider_authority_class to local_truth_only_no_provider_overlay or local_parity_estimate for any row naming a mergeability / approval / queue cue.

provider_authority_class.description: Frozen provider-authority class vocabulary. provider_authoritative = the named row class is authoritative on the provider side (approval state, required-check state, mergeability hint, queue state); local_parity_estimate = computed locally from a fresh provider snapshot, surface MUST render the typed 'estimated locally' disclosure; local_truth_only_no_provider_overlay = local truth, no provider companion; imported_bundle_snapshot = carried by the imported bundle and re-fetching against the canonical provider is forbidden until the user opts the workspace back to a composite posture; browser_handoff_token_only = only resolves through a browser-handoff packet round-trip and local mutations are forbidden.

review_workspace_lifecycle_state.description: Frozen workspace lifecycle vocabulary. provider_overlay_degraded_local_continues is the explicit degraded posture so the chip is mechanical; merged_landed cites the merge_queue_action_record whose mark_landed action closed the workspace; archived_tombstone is the retain-as-tombstone posture for retention / audit / restore.

review_workspace_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the review_workspace audit stream.

review_workspace_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the review_workspace stream. review_workspace_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a review_workspace_denial_reason.

merge_queue_action_class.description: Frozen merge-queue / landing-action class vocabulary. enqueue_for_merge / dequeue_from_merge / attempt_landing / mark_landed / mark_failed_to_land are mutation-class and MUST cite actor_ref + command_id_ref + approval_ticket_ref. mark_blocked_pending_* are non-mutation-class and MAY omit approval_ticket_ref but still MUST cite actor_ref + command_id_ref so the row remains attributable.

merge_queue_action_blocked_reason.description: Frozen blocked-reason vocabulary. not_blocked_action_admissible MUST be paired with enqueue_for_merge / attempt_landing / mark_landed; the six concrete blockers MUST be paired with the matching mark_blocked_pending_* class. A mismatch denies with merge_queue_action_must_not_appear_available_under_blocked_reason.

provider_rule_snapshot_freshness_class.description: Frozen provider-rule-snapshot freshness vocabulary. _fresh and _stale_within_grace are admissible for enqueue_for_merge / attempt_landing / mark_landed; _stale_beyond_grace_blocked and _unverifiable_blocked are admissible only on mark_blocked_pending_freshness rows. A row whose snapshot freshness is _stale_beyond_grace_blocked or _unverifiable_blocked and whose class is not a mark_blocked_pending_* value denies with merge_queue_action_must_not_appear_available_under_blocked_reason.

merge_queue_action_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the merge_queue_action audit stream.

merge_queue_action_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the merge_queue_action stream. merge_queue_action_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a merge_queue_action_denial_reason.

workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the workspace row in schemas/workspace/* the local branch / worktree belongs to.

branch_or_worktree_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch / worktree row the workspace pins. Raw branch names and raw absolute paths never appear here.

head_revision_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the head revision the workspace was opened against. Null until the workspace owner pins one.

local_locator.description: Local locator. Required when review_workspace_source_class is local_branch_or_worktree or composite_local_with_provider_overlay.

connected_provider_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref into schemas/integration/browser_handoff_packet.schema.json connected_provider_record. The actor class the overlay is acting as lives there; this row never duplicates it.

provider_object_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the provider-side object identity the overlay binds to (pull-request id, merge-request id, changelist id). Raw provider-side ids and raw URLs never appear here; the resolver maps the opaque ref.

grace_window_seconds.description: Optional grace window in seconds. Surfaces use this to render the freshness chip mechanically; the freshness state itself remains the source of truth.

provider_overlay.description: Provider-overlay block. Required when review_workspace_source_class is provider_overlay_fetched or composite_local_with_provider_overlay; forbidden otherwise.

bundle_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the imported review-bundle row. The bundle's source class, signing block, and provenance live on the bundle record; this row never duplicates them.

imported_bundle_envelope.description: Imported-bundle envelope. Required when review_workspace_source_class is review_bundle_imported; forbidden otherwise.

browser_handoff_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/integration/browser_handoff_packet.schema.json browser_handoff_packet_record the workspace was opened through. Raw URLs never cross this boundary.

return_anchor_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the return-anchor the packet binds. Re-uses the browser-handoff packet's return_anchor; this row never duplicates the anchor body.

browser_handoff_envelope.description: Browser-handoff envelope. Required when review_workspace_source_class is browser_handoff_token_source; forbidden otherwise.

local_locator.description: Required (non-null) when review_workspace_source_class is local_branch_or_worktree or composite_local_with_provider_overlay. Null otherwise.

provider_overlay.description: Required (non-null) when review_workspace_source_class is provider_overlay_fetched or composite_local_with_provider_overlay. Null otherwise.

imported_bundle_envelope.description: Required (non-null) when review_workspace_source_class is review_bundle_imported. Null otherwise.

browser_handoff_envelope.description: Required (non-null) when review_workspace_source_class is browser_handoff_token_source. Null otherwise.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when review_workspace_lifecycle_state is archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

hosted_review_inbox_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the hosted-review inbox contract. Currently always null; once the inbox contract lands, every workspace whose source class is provider_overlay_fetched or composite_local_with_provider_overlay MUST cite the inbox row the overlay was fetched through. Repurposing this slot is breaking.

merge_policy_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge-policy contract. Currently always null; once the merge-policy contract lands, this slot may carry the workspace's bound merge-policy row id.

allOf.description: local_locator is required (non-null) when review_workspace_source_class is local_branch_or_worktree or composite_local_with_provider_overlay.
local_locator MUST be null when review_workspace_source_class is provider_overlay_fetched, review_bundle_imported, or browser_handoff_token_source.
provider_overlay is required (non-null) when review_workspace_source_class is provider_overlay_fetched or composite_local_with_provider_overlay.
provider_overlay MUST be null when review_workspace_source_class is local_branch_or_worktree, review_bundle_imported, or browser_handoff_token_source.
imported_bundle_envelope is required (non-null) when review_workspace_source_class is review_bundle_imported and MUST be null otherwise.
browser_handoff_envelope is required (non-null) when review_workspace_source_class is browser_handoff_token_source and MUST be null otherwise.
provider_authority_class MUST be local_truth_only_no_provider_overlay when review_workspace_source_class is local_branch_or_worktree.
provider_authority_class MUST be imported_bundle_snapshot when review_workspace_source_class is review_bundle_imported.
provider_authority_class MUST be browser_handoff_token_only when review_workspace_source_class is browser_handoff_token_source.

When the provider overlay is stale_beyond_grace_local_continues or unavailable_local_continues, the workspace MUST resolve provider_authority_class to local_truth_only_no_provider_overlay or local_parity_estimate so cached overlay cues are not relabelled as authoritative.
archived_at is required (non-null) when review_workspace_lifecycle_state is archived_tombstone and MUST be null otherwise.

review_workspace_record.description: Row shape consumed by review surfaces, the merge-queue panel, AI review-aware overlays, support / export, and audit lanes. Exactly one row per active review-workspace identity.

actor_ref.description: Opaque actor ref. Optional on system-driven events (overlay fetch, freshness change), required on user-driven events.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when review_workspace_audit_event_id_value is review_workspace_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is review_workspace_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

review_workspace_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the review_workspace stream.

provider_rule_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the provider-side merge-rule identity the snapshot pins (branch protection rule, required-checks set, required-reviews set, queue policy id). Raw rule bodies and raw rule URLs never appear here.

provider_rule_snapshot.description: Provider rule snapshot bound to a merge-queue action. The snapshot is the per-action pin; the workspace's overlay freshness is independent.

actor_ref.description: Opaque ref to the acting identity. Required (non-null) on every merge_queue_action_record so the action remains attributable; the schema enforces this through the required field list.

command_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the command-dispatch id under which the action was invoked (see schemas/commands/command_descriptor.schema.json). Required (non-null); a missing ref denies with merge_queue_action_attribution_missing.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval-ticket row that admitted the action (schemas/integration/approval_ticket.schema.json). Required (non-null) for mutation-class actions (enqueue_for_merge, dequeue_from_merge, attempt_landing, mark_landed, mark_failed_to_land); MAY be null on the non-mutation mark_blocked_pending_* classes.

hosted_review_inbox_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the hosted-review inbox contract. Currently always null.

merge_policy_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge-policy contract. Currently always null; once the merge-policy contract lands, every merge_queue_action_record MUST cite the merge-policy row that resolved the action's admission.

allOf.description: Mutation-class actions (enqueue_for_merge, attempt_landing, mark_landed) MUST cite merge_queue_action_blocked_reason = not_blocked_action_admissible; a row that names any other reason on those classes denies with merge_queue_action_must_not_appear_available_under_blocked_reason.
mark_blocked_pending_freshness rows MUST cite merge_queue_action_blocked_reason = provider_rule_snapshot_stale and provider_rule_snapshot_freshness_class one of the blocked values.
mark_blocked_pending_required_check rows MUST cite merge_queue_action_blocked_reason = required_check_unverified_or_failing.
mark_blocked_pending_required_review rows MUST cite merge_queue_action_blocked_reason = required_review_missing_or_dismissed.

Mutation-class actions (enqueue_for_merge, dequeue_from_merge, attempt_landing, mark_landed, mark_failed_to_land) MUST cite a non-null approval_ticket_ref; a missing ref denies with merge_queue_action_attribution_missing.

When provider_rule_snapshot_freshness_class is provider_rule_snapshot_stale_beyond_grace_blocked or provider_rule_snapshot_unverifiable_blocked, merge_queue_action_class MUST be mark_blocked_pending_freshness; otherwise the row denies with merge_queue_action_must_not_appear_available_under_blocked_reason.

merge_queue_action_record.description: Row shape consumed by the merge-queue panel, landing pipelines, audit lanes, and support / export. Exactly one row per landing action.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when merge_queue_action_audit_event_id_value is merge_queue_action_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is merge_queue_action_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

merge_queue_action_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the merge_queue_action stream.
